name: ZyntrixAI — Auto Demo from Gmail Enquiry

setup: 1. Import this file into Make.com via Scenarios → Create a new scenario → Import Blueprint
2. Connect your Gmail account (ZyntrixAutomation@gmail.com) to the Gmail trigger
3. The HTTP module POSTs to https://zyntrixai.co/api/process-email — no changes needed once deployed
4. Optionally set x-make-secret header to a random string and add the same as MAKE_SECRET env var on Vercel for basic auth
5. Turn on the scenario and set the schedule to 'Immediately' (webhook/watch mode)
how_it_works: Gmail trigger fires when a new email arrives in ZyntrixAutomation@gmail.com
Make.com POSTs the sender, subject, and email snippet to your Vercel server
Your server parses the email, detects the business niche, generates a tailored HTML demo
Demo is deployed to Netlify as a live URL (e.g. https://zx-smithsbakery-1234567890.netlify.app)
Client receives an auto-reply with a View Your Demo button within ~2 minutes
You receive an owner notification with the lead details and demo URL
env_vars_needed: EMAIL_PASS — Gmail App Password (not your regular password)
NETLIFY_API_TOKEN — Netlify personal access token (netlify.com → User settings → Applications)
STRIPE_STARTER_LINK — Stripe payment link for Starter package
STRIPE_GROWTH_LINK — Stripe payment link for Growth package
